props.Root: generic T and single/multiple Base UI Select.Root props; value, defaultValue, onValueChange, open/defaultOpen/onOpenChange pass through
props.items: record of labels/descriptors or readonly {label,value} array
props.renderValue: selected T or T[] to ReactNode
props.label: visible Field label

aria: trigger is role=combobox with aria-haspopup=listbox and aria-expanded
popup is listbox and items are options with selected/disabled state
label or aria-label/aria-labelledby is required from consumer
hidden input participates in form submission
multiple selection exposes listbox multiselect semantics via Base UI

initialState.value: controlled value, else defaultValue, else null or [] in multiple mode
initialState.open: controlled open, else defaultOpen, else false
initialState.disabled: from root and item descriptor/Option props

transitions.effect: open, highlight/select, emit value change, and normally dismiss single select
move highlight while skipping disabled options and scroll it into view
highlight matching enabled option within Base UI timeout
dismiss according to Base UI reason and focus policy
emit callbacks while supplied props remain authoritative
